test.name: Persist the match_two_examples score on a record_search-sourced link
test.description: Link assertion a_001 — the clean 1850-census Patrick Flynn persona (record_persona_id P1) — to a person in the tree. Because a_001 is record_search-sourced, person-evidence resolves the record from its sidecar, builds a tree subset, and calls match_two_examples. The returned score must be persisted to the new person_evidence entry's match_score.

input.user_message: Link assertion a_001 — the 1850 census Patrick Flynn — to the right person in the tree.

judge_context: person-evidence should resolve a_001's record from its log entry's sidecar, build a tree subset, and call match_two_examples
The new person_evidence entry for a_001 must carry a non-null match_score holding the tool's score (0.88)
The match is strong on every identifier and the score corroborates it — a confident link is appropriate
